overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a nighttime drive through a rain-soaked neon-lit metropolis. The player navigates a vehicle through wet commercial streets, underpasses, and tunnels illuminated by vibrant holographic advertisements and street lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: rainy commercial street with neon storefronts and holographic signs

events.description: passing large illuminated 'El Guapo' billboard on the right side of the road
vehicle begins turning right at intersection, navigating around corner

agents.ego_description: driving through wet city streets at moderate speed, navigating commercial district with neon lighting

notable_agents.action: car driving ahead in the same lane, maintaining distance

entered.detail: futuristic vehicle dashboard with illuminated controls and steering wheel visible throughout
rain-slicked black asphalt reflecting neon lights from surrounding buildings
commercial buildings with bright pink and blue neon signage illuminating the street
large illuminated billboard with 'El Guapo' text and graphic advertisement
tall street lamps casting yellow-white light onto the wet road surface

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a first-person view from inside a vehicle driving through a rain-soaked cyberpunk city at night. The dashboard and steering wheel frame the view of wet asphalt roads reflecting vibrant neon signs from commercial storefronts. The vehicle passes a prominent 'El Guapo' billboard and navigates through sparse pedestrian and vehicle traffic before beginning a right turn at an intersection.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban underpass with concrete walls and overhead structure

events.description: vehicle enters covered underpass with concrete walls, transitioning from open street to enclosed space
lighting shifts from mixed neon to artificial overhead tunnel lighting, reducing visibility of sky

agents.ego_description: navigating through enclosed underpass, following the road as it curves slightly, maintaining steady speed

notable_agents.action: red taillights visible ahead, vehicle maintaining steady speed through underpass

entered.detail: gray concrete walls with graffiti and weather stains marking the underpass structure
thick concrete pillars supporting the overhead roadway structure
linear fluorescent-style lights mounted on the underpass ceiling providing illumination

segments.scene_description: The vehicle completes a right turn and enters a narrow concrete underpass, transitioning from the open neon-lit commercial street to a sheltered corridor. The environment becomes enclosed with concrete walls and support pillars replacing the glass storefronts. Artificial overhead lighting replaces the mixed neon ambiance as the vehicle follows the road through the underpass, approaching the tunnel exit visible ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: open commercial district with holographic advertisements and multi-lane roads

events.description: exiting underpass back into open commercial street with visible neon signage and billboards
approaching and entering second tunnel section with linear ceiling lighting

agents.ego_description: driving through open commercial district, passing intersections and approaching another tunnel entrance

entered.detail: floating holographic displays projecting product advertisements above the street level
tall modern buildings with reflective glass facades and illuminated windows
yellow-striped pedestrian crossing markings on the wet road surface
red neon sign with 'ESCAPE' text marking the tunnel entrance
continuous strip lighting along the tunnel entrance approach

segments.scene_description: Exiting the underpass, the vehicle returns to an open commercial district featuring holographic advertisements and modern glass towers. The wet multi-lane road reflects the vibrant city lights as the vehicle approaches an intersection. The 'El Guapo' billboard appears again in the distance before the vehicle approaches a second tunnel entrance marked by a red 'ESCAPE' neon sign and linear lighting strips.

scene_state.functional_zone: enclosed tunnel with linear lighting transitioning to dense commercial area

events.description: exiting tunnel into dense commercial district with heavy neon signage and pedestrian activity
navigating through intersection with cross traffic and pedestrians visible on sidewalks

agents.ego_description: driving through enclosed tunnel and emerging into dense commercial area with heavy neon lighting and street activity

notable_agents.action: pedestrians walking along the sidewalk under umbrellas in the rain

entered.detail: smooth concrete tunnel walls with reflective surfaces and embedded lighting
continuous rows of bright white lights running the length of the tunnel ceiling
massive floating advertisements and brand displays dominating the skyline after tunnel exit

segments.scene_description: The final segment begins inside a well-lit tunnel with linear ceiling lights and reflective concrete walls. The vehicle maintains steady speed through the enclosed space before emerging at 60 seconds into a dense commercial district filled with massive holographic billboards and bright neon signage. Pedestrians with umbrellas walk along the wet sidewalks as the vehicle navigates through the final intersection, completing the drive through the cyberpunk cityscape.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person perspective from inside a vehicle as it moves from a vibrant, rain-soaked commercial district into a stark, enclosed concrete underpass. It begins by navigating wet asphalt roads that reflect the neon glow of storefronts, passing a prominent El Guapo billboard amidst sparse traffic. As the vehicle reaches an intersection, the camera executes a right turn, causing the open city skyline to vanish. The scene then shifts from the colorful neon ambiance to a sheltered corridor, where concrete walls and support pillars replace the glass storefronts. Finally, the environment transitions to artificial overhead lighting as the vehicle follows the road toward the visible tunnel exit ahead.

The shot follows a continuous drive from an open, neon-lit commercial district through a sterile tunnel and back into the heart of a dense metropolis. It begins as the vehicle exits an underpass into a rain-soaked district of glass towers and holographic advertisements, with the wet road reflecting vibrant lights as it approaches a distant El Guapo billboard. The scene then shifts as the vehicle enters a second tunnel, transitioning from the open city to an enclosed space defined by linear ceiling lights and reflective concrete walls. As the vehicle maintains its speed, it emerges from the tunnel into a final, crowded commercial hub filled with massive holographic signage and pedestrians with umbrellas on wet sidewalks. The movement concludes as the vehicle navigates through a final intersection, fully immersed in the glowing cyberpunk cityscape.
